question_intent: Calculate the average payment amount for members who have charges in the 'Lodging' category or no charges at all, grouped by region

plan.question_intent: Calculate the average payment amount for members who have charges in the 'Lodging' category or no charges at all, grouped by region
plan.detail_query: SELECT leaf_1.region_name, leaf_1.payment_no, leaf_1.payment_dt, leaf_1.payment_amt, leaf_1.category_desc FROM (SELECT m.region_no, r.region_name, p.payment_no, p.payment_dt, p.payment_amt, c.category_no, cat.category_desc FROM payment AS p JOIN member AS m ON p.member_no = m.member_no JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no LEFT JOIN charge AS c ON p.member_no = c.member_no LEFT JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no WHERE (cat.category_desc = 'Lodging' OR cat.category_desc IS NULL) GROUP BY m.region_no, r.region_name, p.payment_no, p.payment_dt, p.payment_amt, c.category_no, cat.category_desc) AS leaf_1 GROUP BY leaf_1.region_name, leaf_1.payment_no, leaf_1.payment_dt, leaf_1.payment_amt, leaf_1.category_desc

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT m.region_no, r.region_name, p.payment_no, p.payment_dt, p.payment_amt, c.category_no, cat.category_desc
join_clauses: JOIN member AS m ON p.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
LEFT JOIN charge AS c ON p.member_no = c.member_no
LEFT JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
blocks.group_by_clause: GROUP BY m.region_no, r.region_name, p.payment_no, p.payment_dt, p.payment_amt, c.category_no, cat.category_desc
blocks.notes: This block retrieves the region information, payment details, and category description for payments made by members who have charges in the 'Lodging' category or no charges at all

blocks.name: root
blocks.from_clause: FROM (SELECT m.region_no, r.region_name, p.payment_no, p.payment_dt, p.payment_amt, c.category_no, cat.category_desc FROM payment AS p JOIN member AS m ON p.member_no = m.member_no JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no LEFT JOIN charge AS c ON p.member_no = c.member_no LEFT JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no WHERE (cat.category_desc = 'Lodging' OR cat.category_desc IS NULL) GROUP BY m.region_no, r.region_name, p.payment_no, p.payment_dt, p.payment_amt, c.category_no, cat.category_desc) AS leaf_1
blocks.notes: This block calculates the average payment amount for members who have charges in the 'Lodging' category or no charges at all, grouped by region

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM payment AS p
JOIN member AS m ON p.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
LEFT JOIN charge AS c ON p.member_no = c.member_no
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: LEFT JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM payment AS p
JOIN member AS m ON p.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
LEFT JOIN charge AS c ON p.member_no = c.member_no
LEFT JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM payment AS p
JOIN member AS m ON p.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
LEFT JOIN charge AS c ON p.member_no = c.member_no
LEFT JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
WHERE (cat.category_desc = 'Lodging')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM payment AS p
JOIN member AS m ON p.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
LEFT JOIN charge AS c ON p.member_no = c.member_no
LEFT JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
WHERE (cat.category_desc = 'Lodging' OR cat.category_desc IS NULL)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM payment AS p
JOIN member AS m ON p.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
LEFT JOIN charge AS c ON p.member_no = c.member_no
LEFT JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
WHERE (cat.category_desc = 'Lodging' OR cat.category_desc IS NULL) AND (cat.category_desc IS NULL)
LIMIT 5

SELECT m.region_no, r.region_name, p.payment_no, p.payment_dt, p.payment_amt, c.category_no, cat.category_desc
FROM payment AS p
JOIN member AS m ON p.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
LEFT JOIN charge AS c ON p.member_no = c.member_no
LEFT JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
WHERE (cat.category_desc = 'Lodging' OR cat.category_desc IS NULL) AND (cat.category_desc IS NULL)
GROUP BY m.region_no, r.region_name, p.payment_no, p.payment_dt, p.payment_amt, c.category_no, cat.category_desc

build_logs.notes: This block calculates the average payment amount for members who have charges in the 'Lodging' category or no charges at all, grouped by region

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT m.region_no, r.region_name, p.payment_no, p.payment_dt, p.payment_amt, c.category_no, cat.category_desc FROM payment AS p JOIN member AS m ON p.member_no = m.member_no JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no LEFT JOIN charge AS c ON p.member_no = c.member_no LEFT JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no WHERE (cat.category_desc = 'Lodging' OR cat.category_desc IS NULL) GROUP BY m.region_no, r.region_name, p.payment_no, p.payment_dt, p.payment_amt, c.category_no, cat.category_desc) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.payment_amt)
FROM (SELECT m.region_no, r.region_name, p.payment_no, p.payment_dt, p.payment_amt, c.category_no, cat.category_desc FROM payment AS p JOIN member AS m ON p.member_no = m.member_no JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no LEFT JOIN charge AS c ON p.member_no = c.member_no LEFT JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no WHERE (cat.category_desc = 'Lodging' OR cat.category_desc IS NULL) GROUP BY m.region_no, r.region_name, p.payment_no, p.payment_dt, p.payment_amt, c.category_no, cat.category_desc) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT SUM(leaf_1.payment_amt)
FROM (SELECT p.member_no, p.payment_no, p.payment_dt, p.payment_amt
FROM payment p
JOIN member m ON p.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN region r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
LEFT JOIN charge c ON m.member_no = c.member_no
WHERE (r.region_name IN ('North American', 'South American'))) AS leaf_1

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.charge_amt)
FROM (SELECT c.charge_no, c.charge_dt, c.charge_amt, m.member_no, m.region_no, p.payment_no, p.payment_dt
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
LEFT JOIN payment AS p ON c.member_no = p.member_no
JOIN corporation AS co ON m.corp_no = co.corp_no
WHERE (co.region_no IN (1, 2, 3, 4)) AND (strftime('%Y', c.charge_dt) = strftime('%Y', p.payment_dt) OR p.payment_no IS NULL)) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average payment amount across all individual payments made by members, considering only payments that are either associated with the 'Lodging' category or have no category assigned?
